betterquesting:10.desc:8:
ME Dense Smart Cable carries 32 channels per line — 4× the capacity of standard cables. Available in 16 colors.

This is the backbone cable for any serious AE2 network. A single dense cable can support up to 32 devices. It also displays channel usage visually.

Fluix-colored dense smart cable (meta 76) is the default.

Tip: Run dense cables between sub-networks and branch off with standard cables to individual machines. This maximizes channel efficiency.
